text.title: Docker Compose (DevOps) Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Docker Compose (DevOps) methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: compose.yaml MUST NOT contain 'version:' field. Compose V2 ignores it; older guides include it but it is legacy.
rule.rationale: compose.yaml MUST NOT contain 'version:' field. Compose V2 ignores it; older guides include it but it is legacy.

rule.statement: Every service named as depends_on target MUST define a healthcheck. Without it 'condition: service_healthy' provides no ordering.
rule.rationale: Every service named as depends_on target MUST define a healthcheck. Without it 'condition: service_healthy' provides no ordering.

rule.statement: Externally-exposed ports bind to 127.0.0.1:PORT:PORT, not 0.0.0.0. Docker bypasses UFW by default.
rule.rationale: Externally-exposed ports bind to 127.0.0.1:PORT:PORT, not 0.0.0.0. Docker bypasses UFW by default.

rule.statement: Persistent data uses named volumes, not bind mounts. Bind mounts couple to host paths.
rule.rationale: Persistent data uses named volumes, not bind mounts. Bind mounts couple to host paths.

rule.statement: Long-running services MUST set restart: unless-stopped. Default 'no' loses services after host reboot.
rule.rationale: Long-running services MUST set restart: unless-stopped. Default 'no' loses services after host reboot.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-docker-compose.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
